caption: The video captures a scene from a conference or seminar held in a large auditorium. The audience is seated in rows of chairs, attentively watching the speaker on stage. The speaker, dressed in a blue shirt and wearing a lanyard, stands in front of a large screen displaying a presentation with hashtags and text related to "has geek" and "rootc." The speaker appears to be gesturing with their hand, possibly emphasizing a point or adjusting something. The atmosphere suggests an engaging and informative session, likely focused on technology or a related field, given the context of the presentation content. The lighting is dim, focusing attention on the speaker and the screen, while the audience area remains relatively dark.
